# About GrowWeedEasy.com
Welcome to GrowWeedEasy.com, founded in 2010!
We’re **Nebula Haze** and **Sirius Fourside** , two dedicated home cannabis growers based in sunny San Diego, California.
Our free tutorials makes it easy to grow great weed… even in [a small space](https://www.growweedeasy.com/growing-cannabis-in-a-mini-tent)!
[](https://www.growweedeasy.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/03/mini-auto-flowering-grow-tent.jpg)
Back in the 2000s, there wasn’t a whole lot of information on how to grow weed, and we struggled to figure out the ins and outs of producing excellent bud in a home environment. Once we cracked the code, we knew we couldn’t keep this knowledge to ourselves. That’s why we launched GrowWeedEasy.com in 2010; to help fellow growers like you achieve huge bountiful harvests of top-quality cannabis.
Growing weed is easy when you know what to do, and we felt we had to share that priceless information with the world. GrowWeedEasy.com now offers hundreds of cannabis growing tutorials about every aspect of the cannabis home grow process, and we’ve empowered millions of growers worldwide through our comprehensive tutorials and online classes.
Grow your own weed and you’ll notice the difference!
[](https://www.growweedeasy.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/02/gorgeous-cannabis-nug-colorful.jpg)
GrowWeedEasy.com is the #1 resource in the world on cannabis home cultivation.
  * **A True Home Grow Bible** – Hundreds of free tutorials on every aspect of the home grow process written by actual growers with decades of home grow experience.
  * **Written by Experienced Home Growers** – Every article on GrowWeedEasy.com was written by a real human who’s actually grown weed. This is how we’re able to include real pictures of cannabis plants to illustrate every step of the way (unlike most other growing websites).
  * **Professional Results at Home** – We’ve gone to cannabis conferences, taken classes, worked with commercial growers, and conducted a ton of experiments. We’ve learned what it takes to produce homegrown weed that’s better than anything you can buy, and we’re here to share those secrets with you.
  * **Join Millions of Growers** – We’ve helped millions of growers through the website, and worked directly with hundreds of growers in our live and online courses. We know where home growers get caught up, and what you need to do to get the results you want.
  * **New Content Every Week** – We write new articles every week, and also update older articles to keep them current. We try new grow styles, grow lights, and also take requests on new content. We do the work to give you exactly the help you need, and are happy to try new grow styles, grow lights, and more.
  * **Lab Testing & Experiments** – We’re the only website (at least that we know of) with home growers that conduct actual [side-by-side grow experiments](https://www.growweedeasy.com/side-by-side-cannabis-grow-journal-experiments-by-nebula-haze) with clones, and **get the buds tested at a lab**. That way we can give you objective, measurable results regarding not only yields, but also THC, CBD, and terpene levels.
  * **Recognized Authority** – Featured in _Business Insider_ ,  _Skunk Magazine_ , _High Times_ , and _Cannabis Business Times_. Contributed pictures and information to [Cannabis Grower’s Handbook](https://www.amazon.com/Cannabis-Growers-Handbook-Marijuana-Cultivation/dp/1936807548?keywords=ed+rosenthal+marijuana+growers+handbook&qid=1694058406&sprefix=ed+rosent%2Caps%2C159&sr=8-1&linkCode=ll1&tag=4200a7-20&linkId=5ca39fb526c1c98d1753f1d5f7948fb7&language=en_US&ref_=as_li_ss_tl) and [Marijuana Garden Saver](https://www.amazon.com/Marijuana-Garden-Saver-Diagnose-Problems/dp/1936807432?_encoding=UTF8&pd_rd_w=w8wYl&content-id=amzn1.sym.bc3ba8d1-5076-4ab7-9ba8-a5c6211e002d&pf_rd_p=bc3ba8d1-5076-4ab7-9ba8-a5c6211e002d&pf_rd_r=140-5715815-0861845&pd_rd_wg=oUWX8&pd_rd_r=9b2f711f-b45f-4c1e-b779-c0a12c5383b2&linkCode=ll1&tag=4200a7-20&linkId=d035e78721284b16fded55defc5b6c5c&language=en_US&ref_=as_li_ss_tl) by cannabis grow legend Ed Rosenthal.
  * **No Account or Login Required** – All the information on GrowWeedEasy.com is available to anyone, anywhere. No need to give us your email or make an account. We don’t track any unnecessary information about our users, so you feel safe browsing the website in privacy.

Our [step-by-step tutorials](https://www.growweedeasy.com/link-guide-growing-cannabis) show you how to grow [big](https://www.growweedeasy.com/how-to-increase-yields-indoors), [dense](https://www.growweedeasy.com/dense-buds), [potent](https://www.growweedeasy.com/7-tips-to-growing-top-shelf-buds) buds!
[](https://www.growweedeasy.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/03/thc-bomb-plant-just-before-harvest.jpg)
We believe it’s crucially important to give new and experienced growers easy access to both basic and advanced growing information. We know that growing your own cannabis gives you the power to get as much top-quality weed as you want, the way you want, and it’s almost free besides the cost of supplies and electricity. For medical marijuana patients, growing may be the only way for them to afford the amount of cannabis needed to get relief. For recreational users, we want to ensure that you always feel like you have an unlimited amount of weed with the effects and quality you desire, and never feel close to running out.
A 4’x4′ grow tent and a good [LED grow light](https://www.growweedeasy.com/5-best-led-grow-lights-2025-cannabis-yields-speed-bud-quality) can easily [grow a pound of weed](https://www.growweedeasy.com/how-to-grow-1-pound-of-weed-indoors-proven-method-grow-tent) or more!
[](https://www.growweedeasy.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/09/raw-photo-vegetative-plants-in-grow-tent-under-leds-es300-side-view.jpg)
The website is continually being updated to create a comprehensive growing cannabis wiki full of tutorials, pictures, videos, hints, tips, secrets, and more! If you are a grower who would like to contribute your own growing articles, or if you have feedback or corrections about our website or newsletter, please [contact us](https://www.growweedeasy.com/website-feedback).
**Free resources for cannabis growers of all skill levels:**
  * Browse GrowWeedEasy.com (use the search bar to find articles about new topics)
  * [Diagnose your sick plant with the free Plant Doctor](https://www.growweedeasy.com/cannabis-symptoms-pictures).
  * [Join our free grow community](https://forum.growweedeasy.com/) and talk with other growers.
  * [Sign up for our weekly newsletter](https://www.growweedeasy.com/message/news) to get a tutorial delivered every Sunday.

[](https://www.instagram.com/growweedeasy/) [](https://www.facebook.com/growweedeasy/) [](https://www.pinterest.com/growweedeasy/) [](https://www.linkedin.com/in/nebula-haze/)
**Take Your Skills to the Next Level**
Interested in our online paid course? We offer a 5-week comprehensive home grow course called [**Home Grow Masterclass**](https://homegrowmasterclass.com/course) a few times a year. This course takes you from seed to weed and beyond. Get proven success, home-grown wisdom, and master the art of cultivation. Beginner’s luck, guaranteed. Even if you’ve never grown a plant in your life, you will produce top-shelf weed on your first grow by following our simple step-by-step instructions. By the end of the course, you will be a plant whisperer with a deep understanding of the cannabis plant and the practical knowledge to consistently produce amazing harvests.
  * [**Sign up for our free weekly newsletter**](https://www.growweedeasy.com/message/news) for useful tips, tricks, and tutorials delivered to your email every Sunday at 4:20 am.
  * **Want expert help on your next grow?** Our comprehensive [Home Grow Masterclass](https://homegrowmasterclass.com/course) takes you from seed to weed, step by step. Lifetime access + **90-day harvest guarantee!**

**Meet the Grow WeedEasy.com** **Creators Below!**
For the last 15 years, we have devoted our lives to teaching people how to grow weed at home. We contribute our time, research, and experience to bring you this website for free. Happy Growing! 
Nebula Haze
Co-founder, growing consultant, and main writer at GrowWeedEasy.com. Nebula is a passionate writer who draws from over a decade of home-growing experience as well as consulting for small-scale and hobbyist-level growers. She has written hundreds of articles, thought pieces, and tutorials about growing cannabis at home. Her articles, tutorials, and interviews have been published in print and online and GrowWeedEasy.com has been featured on _Business Insider_ , _High Times_ , _Skunk Magazine_ , and _Cannabis Business Times_. Check out her [side-by-side cannabis growing experiments](https://www.growweedeasy.com/side-by-side-cannabis-grow-journal-experiments-by-nebula-haze).
[](https://www.growweedeasy.com/wp-content/uploads/2018/12/nebula-haze-profile-picture.png)
Sirius Fourside
Sirius started growing in 2007 and has extensive experience in all types of grow styles including soil, coco, and hydroponics. His focus is on experimenting with new trends and technology for home growers, such as testing new models of [LED grow lights](https://www.growweedeasy.com/5-best-led-grow-lights-2025-cannabis-yields-speed-bud-quality) and exploring different methods of [hydroponics](https://www.growweedeasy.com/high-yield-bubbleponics-technique), automated grow systems, and [fully organic growing](https://www.growweedeasy.com/organic-super-soil). Sirius is also the main developer for the site, the person who shoots and edits all the videos, and overall in charge of the technical side of things.

GrowWeedEasy.com was [founded in 2010](https://www.growweedeasy.com/about) by Nebula Haze and Sirius Fourside. Featured in _High Times_ , Ed Rosenthal’s books, _Cannabis Business Times_ , and _Skunk Magazine_ , GrowWeedEasy.com is the **#1 free resource in the world** for learning how to grow cannabis at home. Our simple step-by-step tutorials make it easy for anyone to grow great weed. **[Sign up for our free newsletter](https://www.growweedeasy.com/message/news)** to get grow tips delivered every Sunday at 4:20 AM.
